target.title: fix: render workspace avatars in identity card
target.body:
﻿Closes #97602

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where workspace-relative agent avatars could appear broken in the Control UI Personal card because identity/bootstrap payloads could hand the browser an auth-gated `/avatar/<agentId>` URL that plain image elements cannot load with Bearer auth.

## Why This Change Was Made

Avatar URL projection now lives with the existing agent avatar owner code in `src/agents/identity-avatar.ts` instead of duplicating workspace file handling in gateway session projection. `agent.identity.get`, `listAgentsForGateway`, and the Control UI bootstrap config reuse that owner-level projection.

The shared local-file projection keeps the workspace file-read boundary on `openRootFileSync` and carries the resolved workspace root with local avatar resolutions, so data URI reads still happen through the root-safe opened-fd path. Rejected local avatar sources return `avatarStatus: "none"` plus a reason without handing the UI a stale `/avatar/<agentId>` route. Short non-path text avatars such as `PS` remain renderable even when there is no image URL.

Unsupported local avatar extensions are intentionally blocked by the existing local avatar policy. The supported local avatar set is image-only (`png`, `jpg/jpeg`, `gif`, `webp`, `svg`); files such as `notes.txt` are reported as `unsupported_extension` and are not inlined.

AI-assisted with Codex.

## User Impact

Control UI can render valid workspace-relative Personal card avatars consistently across bootstrap, identity refresh, agent list, and chat-adjacent identity surfaces, without making unauthenticated `/avatar/<agentId>` image requests. Missing, outside-workspace, too-large, or unsupported local avatar image files fall back to the product logo/text presentation and keep their source/status/reason visible for repair. Existing short text avatar fallbacks remain visible.

## Evidence

- Identity RPC and symlink boundary coverage: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts -- -t "agent.identity.get|symlinks that escape"` -> 10 passed, 326 skipped
- Bootstrap config coverage: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/control-ui.http.test.ts -- -t "bootstrap config"` -> 44 passed, 192 skipped
- Avatar projection/list coverage: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts -- -t "avatar"` -> 8 passed, 424 skipped
- UI render coverage, including rejected-route suppression and short text avatar preservation: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/config-quick.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts` -> 39 passed
- Whitespace check: `git diff --check`

Additional red/green checks run while building this PR:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts -- -t "returns workspace-relative avatars as data URLs"`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts -- -t "does not inline unsupported workspace avatar files"`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts -- -t "keeps identity data URLs renderable"`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts -- -t "does not render stale route avatars"`

Notes:
- Full `src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts` on this Windows checkout still has unrelated pre-existing failures around SQLite temp cleanup `EBUSY` and `/tmp` path normalization, so focused avatar coverage was used for this PR.
- Local autoreview was attempted after the final refactor, but the autoreview wrapper failed before engine review with `WinError 267` while resolving `git` from this Windows checkout path. Earlier post-fix autoreview also hit the Codex account usage limit, so there is no successful fresh autoreview result to claim.
target.author: lzy3538
